title: prunus cornuta
intro: Prunus cornuta, also known as the Chinese flowering dogwood or Cornelian cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia. The plant's flowers and bark have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus cornuta include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Prunus cornuta can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
